Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair to Succeed Powell in May 2026** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

President Trump announced on January 30, 2026, his intention to nominate former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh to replace Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve Chair, whose term ends in May 2026[1][2][3]. Powell criticized for slow rate cuts will stay through May and could remain a board governor until
